captions: A young man with short black hair and glasses is walking forward, dressed in a white crewneck sweatshirt with a small logo on the chest, black trousers, and grey sneakers.
A male pedestrian wearing a white sweater and black pants walks down an indoor corridor, he has no hat or backpack and is looking straight ahead.
